title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 24
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a lost wallet.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you found your wallet yet? You seemed worried earlier today. || Girl: Not at first. I went back to the changing room at the sports centre, and then I checked the café counter, but nobody had handed it in. || Boy: So where did it turn up? || Girl: My brother checked my coat and [1]it was in the inside pocket all the time[/1]. I will collect it before the place closes, because I need it tomorrow. || Boy: That is a relief. At least you can stop searching and get ready now.
items.question: Where was the wallet?
items.explanation: The wallet was in the inside pocket of a coat.

items.context: You hear two friends preparing for a camping weekend.
items.audio_script: Woman: Have you packed for the camping weekend yet? I put a torch in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Man: That was mentioned earlier, but there are lots of mosquitoes near the river campsite. [2]We have to take insect repellent this time[/2].. || Woman: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a football as well? || Man: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should they take?

items.context: You hear two family members planning a day out.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still going to go cycling this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Woman: That was our first plan, but heavy rain is expected all day. We also thought about whether to visit the beach. || Man: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Woman: [3]We are going to the indoor climbing centre instead[/3].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Man: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?

options.B: Go to an indoor climbing centre

items.explanation: They decide to go to an indoor climbing centre.

items.context: You hear two travellers talking about a train journey.
items.audio_script: Girl: I need to check the time for the train to York. I wrote down six twenty, but I am not sure it is correct. || Boy: It changed this morning because a replacement train is being prepared this evening. [4]The train will leave at ten to seven[/4]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Girl: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Boy: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time will the train leave?
items.explanation: The train will leave at ten to seven.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a bicycle.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting on with your bicycle? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Girl: I first thought the front tyre was flat, and my brother wondered whether the chain had come off. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [5]The brakes need repairing before I can ride it[/5].. || Boy: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it for the cycling trip at the weekend. || Girl: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the bicycle?

items.context: You hear two people planning a trip to the hospital.
items.audio_script: Woman: How are you getting to the hospital tomorrow? I thought you were planning to travel by car. || Man: I was, but the car will be at the garage and the train station is too far away. I also considered going by train. [6]We will take a taxi instead[/6].. || Woman: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Woman: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will they get to the hospital?

items.context: You hear two people buying a present for a cousin.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you choose anything for my cousin's graduation? You were thinking about a wallet when we spoke yesterday. || Woman: I looked at that, and nearly chose a book, but she needs one for her new college course. [7]I bought a backpack in the end[/7].. || Man: That sounds like a better choice. It is useful as well as thoughtful, so I am sure they will like it. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt just in case, and I will wrap it carefully this evening after dinner.
items.question: What present did the speaker buy?
